elements.description: Bottom dimension chain: 1.00(north overhang) | 2.00(F-E) | 3.70(E-D) | 2.20(D-C) | 3.70(C-B) | 1.80(B-A) | 0.55 | 1.50, bracket '13.40' (gridF-gridA) then a separate '2.05' beyond grid A

warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 1) cuts along the depth direction (parallel to gridF-E-D-C-B-A), through the ซักล้าง/ทานอาหาร/โถง/พักผ่อน/เฉลียง sequence on the ground floor and นอน3/นอน1/ระเบียง on the upper floor.
Sibling section รูปตัด 2 is in _หน้า14_section2.json (not yet read at time of writing this file). This house has only 2 sections total (A-11, A-12), one fewer than house #4's 3.

GRID-RELEVANT DUMMY-GRID CONFIRMATION (reporting only, master file not edited) -- this is the FOURTH independent sheet (after the ground-floor plan หน้า06, รูปด้าน 2 หน้า10, and รูปด้าน 3 หน้า11) to show the exact same 2.05m dimension south of grid A: this section's own bottom dimension chain prints '...1.80(B-A)...' then grid 'A', then a separate '2.05' beyond it, right where the diagonally-hatched stair-cut area ('เฉลียง_ground_cut_stair' element above) is drawn. This strongly reinforces the ground-floor-plan finding that the 'Aprime' dummy grid (pos_m=-2.05 in the master gridline file) corresponds to the ST1 entrance-stair feature, not a carport/terrace slab as originally speculated from the structural beam plan alone.

New level information not seen on prior sheets in this pass: 'ระดับหลังเสาล่าง +6.95' and 'ระดับหลังเสาบน +8.05' (roof-post/column top levels above the main roof-beam level +6.65) -- these describe the roof structure's own vertical framing levels, height-chained as 6.65+0.30=6.95 and +1.10=8.05.

Two separate roof-eave detail callouts are printed, 'R2/A-23' (west/gridF end) and 'R1/A-23' (east/gridB end) -- both reference the same sheet A-23 (this house's เชิงชาย/eave-expansion detail, per the index), suggesting that sheet contains 2 distinct eave conditions (R1 and R2) rather than a single detail. To be confirmed when A-23 (หน้า24 per this house's index numbering) is read later in this pass.
Roof framing itself is deferred to structural drawings ('โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง'), consistent with the roof plan's equivalent note (หน้า08).
